phrasal_verbs.meaning: make sb feel sad or lose hope
suggest that sth is the result of
make a place difficult or impossible to enter, leave or communicate with; disconnect
start and be likely to continue for a while (for rain, winter, an economic depression, etc)
become less noisy, powerful or active
represent (for abbreviations and symbols); put up with
destroy or remove (for buildings, statues, etc)
accept sth and try to deal with it

D.title: Original key word transformation practice
D.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

questions.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Weather and the environment. **WEATHER**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Weather and the environment.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Weather and the environment. **EFFECT**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Weather and the environment.

Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Weather and the environment. **LOOK**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Weather and the environment.
questions.answer: taking a quick look at/having a quick look at
